categories.name: Types of snakes based on habitat

fun_fact: India is home to over 300 species of snakes, but only a handful pose a real danger to humans. Most snakes play a vital role in controlling rodent populations. Snake Speek, a youth-led initiative from Andhra Pradesh by wildlife enthusiast Sampath Kantimahanti, is changing that narrative — their video 'Learning to Coexist with Snakes' was recognised among the top 50 entries globally at the 2026 National Geographic Slingshot Challenge. Read more
